channel.title: Energy Transition on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Energy Transition on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: Beyond the Green Premium: The Pragmatic Realities of EV Mobility in Southeast Asia
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A deep dive into the pragmatic realities of EV fleet adoption in Southeast Asia, moving beyond the ‘green premium’ to focus on margin survival, infrastructure moats, and the ‘poverty anxiety’ of the mass market.

item.title: Flatpeak: The Missing Layer of the Energy Transition
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Why your EV is flying blind, and how Flatpeak—founded by the architect of M-PESA—is building the ‘Stripe for Energy’ to fix it.
